full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page report synthesizing my Part B findings — paper summary, reproduction, ablations, failure mode, and reflection
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI suggested a five-section structure: (1) Paper Summary — 0.5 pages covering core contribution and method, (2) Reproduction — 1 page covering dataset, implementation, and results comparison, (3) Ablation Studies — 1 page covering both ablation experiments with results and interpretation, (4) Failure Mode — 0.5 pages connecting the identified assumption to experimental evidence, (5) Reflection — 1 page on challenges, surprises, and what I'd do differently.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Got a clear outline matching the exam requirements
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: Outline matches the 5 required sections in the exam doc

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me write a concise one-paragraph summary of Livni et al. 2012 for my report
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI provided a draft paragraph summarizing the paper: introduces RSVM2 as a robustified multiclass SVM, proves equivalence to ℓ₂,∞ regularization via Theorem 3.1, and demonstrates improvements on UCI datasets.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Partially — got a draft that I heavily edited to match my own understanding from working through Parts 1-3
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: Summary reflects what I actually understood from doing the implementation

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me write an honest reflection section — what I couldn't implement, what surprised me, what I'd do differently
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI provided guiding questions rather than content: What was the hardest part? Were there any results that contradicted your expectations? Did the paper's claims hold up in your experiments? What would you do with more time? I used these as prompts to write my own reflection.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Gave me prompts to think about. The actual surprises and difficulties are from my real experience doing the tasks
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: These are genuine reflections from my work
